title: baccharis glaucescens
intro: Baccharis glaucescens, also known as the silver broom, is a shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Baccharis glaucescens include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. Baccharis glaucescens can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed or applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
